message:
Add zero-allocation reject path tests and harden cache error handling

patterns.rs: Add comprehensive test suite (bd-3mog) verifying the
Cow<'static, str> conversion in Classification produces Cow::Borrowed
on reject paths (zero heap allocations). Tests cover:
- Tier 0/1/2 reject paths produce borrowed Cow strings
- Classification correctness for both reject and accept paths
- Serde JSON roundtrip preserves all fields
- ClassificationTier display and boundary conditions

cache.rs: Improve error handling in eviction path:
- Replace unwrap() on LRU pop with graceful early return
- Add explicit cache-empty guard before eviction loop
- Prevents panic if concurrent access drains cache between size check
  and eviction attempt

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
